name: Tim
goal: Tim aims to help his group select a university project that explores the lasting effects of a significant historical event on contemporary social issues.
backstory: Tim is a history major who has always been fascinated by the impact of historical events on modern society, and has experience working on group projects that involve researching and presenting on various time periods. He prefers projects that allow him to delve into the social and cultural aspects of history. His past experience with group work has taught him the importance of collaboration and effective communication.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, cost focus means being mindful of the resources required for the project, such as access to historical archives or equipment for presentations, and finding ways to minimize expenses without compromising the quality of the work.
focus_notes.comfort: Comfort focus for Tim means creating a positive and inclusive team environment, where everyone feels supported and able to contribute their ideas and perspectives on the historical topic.
focus_notes.time: Time focus for Tim involves managing the project timeline effectively, ensuring that all tasks are completed on schedule, and allowing sufficient time for research, preparation, and practice before the final presentation.
focus_notes.safety: Safety focus for Tim is about avoiding potential pitfalls or controversies in the project, such as misrepresenting historical facts or offending certain groups, and taking a thoughtful and respectful approach to sensitive topics.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Flexibility means being open to adjusting the project plan if needed, whether it's changing the topic, adapting to new information, or modifying the presentation style to better engage the audience and effectively communicate the historical content.
